title: Kale's Collection [Cobblemon]
description: A Cobblemon add-on including Pokemon missing from the mod that I've personally modeled.
body:
## Cobblemon add-on for a collection of the various models I've made. 

The downloaded file must be in both your **datapack**, and **resourcepack** folder to function.

All models are fully animated, even for Cobblemon 1.5's new battle animation system!

_Fully compatible with Terralith, Incendium and Better End_ 

## This pack currently includes:

• **Deoxys**: _Normal, Attack, Defense, and Speed_

• **Iron Bundle**

• **Iron Treads**

• **Slither Wing**

• **Axew, Fraxure & Haxorus**

• **Noibat, & Noivern**

• **Togedemaru**

### **Where to find them:**

_**Deoxys**_ is an ultra-rare spawn found in the end. It will only spawn in it's normal form. To change it's forms you can interact with it using the following items

  **End Crystal:** Attack
  
  **Shulker Shell:** Defense
  
  **Chorus Fruit:** Speed
  
  **End Stone:** Normal


_**Iron Bundle**_ can be found in the overworld skating about most frigid biomes, as well as the end. I wonder if there's a way to meet both conditions...

_**Iron Treads**_ can be found in arid, and rocky places. You may rarely encounter one the badlands. **If you're using Better End, you may find them in the Dust Wasteland**

_**Slither Wing**_ can be found in hot climates, such as mesas or jungles. In the Nether, you'll find it in Crimson Forests. **If you're using Better End, you may find them in the Amber Valley**

_**Axew, Fraxure and Haxorus**_ can all be found in taigas and mountains. **If you're using Better End, you may find them in the Dragon Graveyard**

_**Noibat and Noivern**_ are typically found underground. They prefer to make their nests in some biomes more commonly than others, such as Drip Stone Caves and even the Deep Dark. At night they can sometimes be found in Dark Forests. **If you're using Better End, you may find them in the Chorus Forest**

_**Togedemaru**_ can be found roaming around mountains, and other hilly regions. One of it's abilities may be the key to attracting even more of them...
